name: Petto Di Pollo Al Limone e Zen Zaro
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove skin and fat from chicken breasts.
2. Flatten the chicken breasts using a wooden mallet.
3. Cut the breasts in half through the center, leaving a hinge.
4. Melt butter in a heavy skillet over medium heat.
5. Add white wine and cook until bubbly.
6. Add the prepared chicken breasts and cook on medium-high heat for about two minutes or until partially cooked.
7. Add lemon juice and ginger to the chicken.
8. Reduce heat to medium-low and continue cooking for about six more minutes.
9. Remove the breasts with a slotted spoon and serve immediately on a warmed platter.
10. Garnish with lemon wedges and chopped parsley.
